/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libturtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtle_controller/msg/robot_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtle_controller/msg/robot_cmd__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtle_controller/msg/directional_distance__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aula-robotica/ros_ws/build/turtle_controller:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
